title: February 2026 CVE Landscape: 13 Critical Vulnerabilities Mark 43% Drop from Janu

scripts.content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 - Block threat IPs for: February 2026 CVE Landscape: 13 Critical Vulnerabilities Mar
iptables -A INPUT -s 20.12.5.3 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 20.12.6.1 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 20.15.4.2 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 20.18.2.1 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 20.9.8.2 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 20.12.5.3 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 20.12.6.1 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 20.15.4.2 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 20.18.2.1 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 20.9.8.2 -j DROP
echo 'Firewall rules applied'
SecRule REQUEST_HEADERS:Host "@rx document\.doc" "id:370001,phase:1,deny,status:403,msg:'CDB APEX Block: thr-0bcebcdeb192'"

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((dest_ip IN ("20.12.5.3","20.12.6.1","20.15.4.2","20.18.2.1","20.9.8.2")) OR (query IN ("document.doc"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count

#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 - Emergency Hardening Script
# Threat: February 2026 CVE Landscape: 13 Critical Vulnerabilities Mar
# Generated: 2026-03-28T17:03:01.825929+00:00

echo "[*] Updating system packages..."
apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y 2>/dev/null || yum update -y 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Enabling firewall..."
ufw enable 2>/dev/null || firewall-cmd --set-default-zone=drop 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Disabling unnecessary services..."
systemctl disable --now telnet.socket 2>/dev/null
systemctl disable --now rsh.socket 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Setting secure SSH configuration..."
sed -i 's/#PermitRootLogin yes/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
systemctl restart sshd

echo "[+] Hardening complete for threat: thr-0bcebcdeb192"
